javascript:(()%3D%3E%7Bvar%20Nt%3DObject.create%3Bvar%20ze%3DObject.defineProperty%3Bvar%20wt%3DObject.getOwnPropertyDescriptor%3Bvar%20At%3DObject.getOwnPropertyNames%3Bvar%20St%3DObject.getPrototypeOf%2CRt%3DObject.prototype.hasOwnProperty%3Bvar%20fe%3D(i%2Ce)%3D%3E()%3D%3E(e%7C%7Ci((e%3D%7Bexports%3A%7B%7D%7D).exports%2Ce)%2Ce.exports)%3Bvar%20Lt%3D(i%2Ce%2Ct%2Cn)%3D%3E%7Bif(e%26%26typeof%20e%3D%3D%22object%22%7C%7Ctypeof%20e%3D%3D%22function%22)for(let%20a%20of%20At(e))!Rt.call(i%2Ca)%26%26a!%3D%3Dt%26%26ze(i%2Ca%2C%7Bget%3A()%3D%3Ee%5Ba%5D%2Cenumerable%3A!(n%3Dwt(e%2Ca))%7C%7Cn.enumerable%7D)%3Breturn%20i%7D%3Bvar%20Ct%3D(i%2Ce%2Ct)%3D%3E(t%3Di!%3Dnull%3FNt(St(i))%3A%7B%7D%2CLt(e%7C%7C!i%7C%7C!i.__esModule%3Fze(t%2C%22default%22%2C%7Bvalue%3Ai%2Cenumerable%3A!0%7D)%3At%2Ci))%3Bvar%20Ge%3Dfe((Hi%2Cge)%3D%3E%7Bfunction%20He(i%2Ce)%7Bif(e%26%26e.documentElement)i%3De%2Ce%3Darguments%5B2%5D%3Belse%20if(!i%7C%7C!i.documentElement)throw%20new%20Error(%22First%20argument%20to%20Readability%20constructor%20should%20be%20a%20document%20object.%22)%3Bif(e%3De%7C%7C%7B%7D%2Cthis._doc%3Di%2Cthis._docJSDOMParser%3Dthis._doc.firstChild.__JSDOMParser__%2Cthis._articleTitle%3Dnull%2Cthis._articleByline%3Dnull%2Cthis._articleDir%3Dnull%2Cthis._articleSiteName%3Dnull%2Cthis._attempts%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis._debug%3D!!e.debug%2Cthis._maxElemsToParse%3De.maxElemsToParse%7C%7Cthis.DEFAULT_MAX_ELEMS_TO_PARSE%2Cthis._nbTopCandidates%3De.nbTopCandidates%7C%7Cthis.DEFAULT_N_TOP_CANDIDATES%2Cthis._charThreshold%3De.charThreshold%7C%7Cthis.DEFAULT_CHAR_THRESHOLD%2Cthis._classesToPreserve%3Dthis.CLASSES_TO_PRESERVE.concat(e.classesToPreserve%7C%7C%5B%5D)%2Cthis._keepClasses%3D!!e.keepClasses%2Cthis._serializer%3De.serializer%7C%7Cfunction(t)%7Breturn%20t.innerHTML%7D%2Cthis._disableJSONLD%3D!!e.disableJSONLD%2Cthis._allowedVideoRegex%3De.allowedVideoRegex%7C%7Cthis.REGEXPS.videos%2Cthis._flags%3Dthis.FLAG_STRIP_UNLIKELYS%7Cthis.FLAG_WEIGHT_CLASSES%7Cthis.FLAG_CLEAN_CONDITIONALLY%2Cthis._debug)%7 unction()%7Bvar%20i%3DArray.prototype.slice%2Ce%3Di.call(arguments)%2Ct%3De.map(function(n)%7Breturn%20i.call(n)%7D)%3Breturn%20Array.prototype.concat.apply(%5B%5D%2Ct)%7D%2C_getAllNodesWithTag%3Afunction(i%2Ce)%7Breturn%20i.querySelectorAll%3Fi.querySelectorAll(e.join(%22%2C%22))%3A%5B%5D.concat.apply(%5B%5D%2Ce.map(function(t)%7Bvar%20n%3Di.getElementsByTagName(t)%3Breturn%20Array.isArray(n)%3Fn%3AArray.from(n)%7D))%7D%2C_cleanClasses%3Afunction(i)%7Bvar%20e%3Dthis._classesToPreserve%2Ct%3D(i.getAttribute(%22class%22)%7C%7C%22%22).split(%2F%5Cs%2B%2F).filter(function(n)%7Breturn%20e.indexOf(n)!%3D-1%7D).join(%22%20%22)%3Bfor(t%3Fi.setAttribute(%22class%22%2Ct)%3Ai.removeAttribute(%22class%22)%2Ci%3Di.firstElementChild%3Bi%3Bi%3Di.nextElementSibling)this._cleanClasses(i)%7D%2C_fixRelativeUris%3Afunction(i)%7Bvar%20e%3Dthis._doc.baseURI%2Ct%3Dthis._doc.documentURI%3Bfunction%20n(r)%7Bif(e%3D%3Dt%26%26r.charAt(0)%3D%3D%22%23%22)return%20r%3Btry%7Breturn%20new%20URL(r%2Ce).href%7Dcatch%7B%7Dreturn%20r%7Dvar%20a%3Dthis._getAllNodesWithTag(i%2C%5B%22a%22%5D)%3Bthis._forEachNode(a%2Cfunction(r)%7Bvar%20l%3Dr.getAttribute(%22href%22)%3Bif(l)if(l.indexOf(%22javascript%3A%22)%3D%3D%3D0)if(r.childNodes.length%3D%3D%3D1%26%26r.childNodes%5B0%5D.nodeType%3D%3D%3Dthis.TEXT_NODE)%7Bvar%20o%3Dthis._doc.createTextNode(r.textContent)%3Br.parentNode.replaceChild(o%2Cr)%7Delse%7Bfor(var%20c%3Dthis._doc.createElement(%22span%22)%3Br.firstChild%3B)c.appendChild(r.firstChild)%3Br.parentNode.replaceChild(c%2Cr)%7Delse%20r.setAttribute(%22href%22%2Cn(l))%7D)%3Bvar%20s%3Dthis._getAllNodesWithTag(i%2C%5B%22img%22%2C%22picture%22%2C%22figure%22%2C%22video%22%2C%22audio%22%2C%22source%22%5D)%3Bthis._forEachNode(s%2Cfunction(r)%7Bvar%20l%3Dr.getAttribute(%22src%22)%2Co%3Dr.getAttribute(%22poster%22)%2Cc%3Dr.getAttribute(%22srcset%22)%3Bif(l%26%26r.setAttribute(%22src%22%2Cn(l))%2Co%26%26r.setAttribute(%22poster%22%2Cn(o))%2Cc)%7Bvar%20h%3Dc.replace(this.REGEXPS.srcsetUrl%2Cfunction(u%2Cf%2Cg%2Cb)%7Breturn%20n(f)%2B(g%7C%7C%22%22)%2Bb%7D)%3Br.setAttribute(%22srcset%22%2Ch)%7D%7D)%7D%2C_simplifyNestedElements%3Afunction(i)%7Bfor(var%20e%3Di%3Be%3B)%7Bif(e.parentNode%26%26%5B%22DIV%22%2C%22SECTION%22%5D.includes(e.tagName)%26%26!(e.id%26%26e.id.startsWith(%22readability%22)))%7Bif(this._isElementWithoutContent(e))%7Be%3Dthis._removeAndGetNext(e)%3Bcontinue%7Delse%20if(this._hasSingleTagInsideElement(e%2C%22DIV%22)%7C%7Cthis._hasSingleTagInsideElement(e%2C%22SECTION%22))%7Bfor(var%20t%3De.children%5B0%5D%2Cn%3D0%3Bn%3Ce.attributes.length%3Bn%2B%2B)t.setAttribute(e.attributes%5Bn%5D.name%2Ce.attributes%5Bn%5D.value)%3Be.parentNode.replaceChild(t%2Ce)%2Ce%3Dt%3Bcontinue%7D%7De%3Dthis._getNextNode(e)%7D%7D%2C_getArticleTitle%3Afunction()%7Bvar%20i%3Dthis._doc%2Ce%3D%22%22%2Ct%3D%22%22%3Btry%7Be%3Dt%3Di.title.trim()%2Ctypeof%20e!%3D%22string%22%26%26(e%3Dt%3Dthis._getInnerText(i.getElementsByTagName(%22title%22)%5B0%5D))%7Dcatch%7B%7Dvar%20n%3D!1%3Bfunction%20a(h)%7Breturn%20h.split(%2F%5Cs%2B%2F).length%7Dif(%2F%20%5B%5C%7C%5C-%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D%20%2F.test(e))n%3D%2F%20%5B%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D%20%2F.test(e)%2Ce%3Dt.replace(%2F(.*)%5B%5C%7C%5C-%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D%20.*%2Fgi%2C%22%241%22)%2Ca(e)%3C3%26%26(e%3Dt.replace(%2F%5B%5E%5C%7C%5C-%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D*%5B%5C%7C%5C-%5C%5C%5C%2F%3E%C2%BB%5D(.*)%2Fgi%2C%22%241%22))%3Belse%20if(e.indexOf(%22%3A%20%22)!%3D%3D-1)%7Bvar%20s%3Dthis._concatNodeLists(i.getElementsByTagName(%22h1%22)%2Ci.getElementsByTagName(%22h2%22))%2Cr%3De.trim()%2Cl%3Dthis._someNode(s%2Cfunction(h)%7Breturn%20h.textContent.trim()%3D%3D%3Dr%7D)%3Bl%7C%7C(e%3Dt.substring(t.lastIndexOf(%22%3A%22)%2B1)%2Ca(e)%3C3%3Fe%3Dt.substring(t.indexOf(%22%3A%22)%2B1)%3Aa(t.substr(0%2Ct.indexOf(%22%3A%22)))%3E5%26%26(e%3Dt))%7Delse%20if(e.length%3E150%7C%7Ce.length%3C15)%7Bvar%20o%3Di.getElementsByTagName(%22h1%22)%3Bo.length%3D%3D%3D1%26%26(e%3Dthis._getInnerText(o%5B0%5D))%7De%3De.trim().replace(this.REGEXPS.normalize%2C%22%20%22)%3Bvar%20c%3 Child)%3Bi.appendChild(p)%2Cthis._initializeNode(p)%7Delse%20if(p)%7Bfor(var%20P%3D%5B%5D%2CR%3D1%3BR%3Cg.length%3BR%2B%2B)g%5BR%5D.readability.contentScore%2Fp.readability.contentScore%3E%3D.75%26%26P.push(this._getNodeAncestors(g%5BR%5D))%3Bvar%20ne%3D3%3Bif(P.length%3E%3Dne)for(d%3Dp.parentNode%3Bd.tagName!%3D%3D%22BODY%22%3B)%7Bfor(var%20re%3D0%2Cse%3D0%3Bse%3CP.length%26%26re%3Cne%3Bse%2B%2B)re%2B%3DNumber(P%5Bse%5D.includes(d))%3Bif(re%3E%3Dne)%7Bp%3Dd%3Bbreak%7Dd%3Dd.parentNode%7Dp.readability%7C%7Cthis._initializeNode(p)%2Cd%3Dp.parentNode%3Bfor(var%20ae%3Dp.readability.contentScore%2Cvt%3Dae%2F3%3Bd.tagName!%3D%3D%22BODY%22%3B)%7Bif(!d.readability)%7Bd%3Dd.parentNode%3Bcontinue%7Dvar%20Ie%3Dd.readability.contentScore%3Bif(Ie%3Cvt)break%3Bif(Ie%3Eae)%7Bp%3Dd%3Bbreak%7Dae%3Dd.readability.contentScore%2Cd%3Dd.parentNode%7Dfor(d%3Dp.parentNode%3Bd.tagName!%3D%22BODY%22%26%26d.children.length%3D%3D1%3B)p%3Dd%2Cd%3Dp.parentNode%3Bp.readability%7C%7Cthis._initializeNode(p)%7Dvar%20E%3De.createElement(%22DIV%22)%3Bt%26%26(E.id%3D%22readability-content%22)%3Bvar%20Et%3DMath.max(10%2Cp.readability.contentScore*.2)%3Bd%3Dp.parentNode%3Bfor(var%20le%3Dd.children%2CZ%3D0%2CDe%3Dle.length%3BZ%3CDe%3BZ%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20v%3Dle%5BZ%5D%2CG%3D!1%3Bif(this.log(%22Looking%20at%20sibling%20node%3A%22%2Cv%2Cv.readability%3F%22with%20score%20%22%2Bv.readability.contentScore%3A%22%22)%2Cthis.log(%22Sibling%20has%20score%22%2Cv.readability%3Fv.readability.contentScore%3A%22Unknown%22)%2Cv%3D%3D%3Dp)G%3D!0%3Belse%7Bvar%20Pe%3D0%3Bif(v.className%3D%3D%3Dp.className%26%26p.className!%3D%3D%22%22%26%26(Pe%2B%3Dp.readability.contentScore*.2)%2Cv.readability%26%26v.readability.contentScore%2BPe%3E%3DEt)G%3D!0%3Belse%20if(v.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22P%22)%7Bvar%20Be%3Dthis._getLinkDensity(v)%2C%24e%3Dthis._getInnerText(v)%2Coe%3D%24e.length%3B(oe%3E80%26%26Be%3C.25%7C%7Coe%3C80%26%26oe%3E0%26%26Be%3D%3D%3D0%26%26%24e.search(%2F%5C.(%20%7C%24)%2F)!%3D%3D-1)%26%26(G%3D!0)%7D%7DG%26%26(this.log(%22Ap .length%3E0%26%26i.length%3C100)%3A!1%7D%2C_unescapeHtmlEntities%3Afunction(i)%7Bif(!i)return%20i%3Bvar%20e%3Dthis.HTML_ESCAPE_MAP%3Breturn%20i.replace(%2F%26(quot%7Camp%7Capos%7Clt%7Cgt)%3B%2Fg%2Cfunction(t%2Cn)%7Breturn%20e%5Bn%5D%7D).replace(%2F%26%23(%3F%3Ax(%5B0-9a-z%5D%7B1%2C4%7D)%7C(%5B0-9%5D%7B1%2C4%7D))%3B%2Fgi%2Cfunction(t%2Cn%2Ca)%7Bvar%20s%3DparseInt(n%7C%7Ca%2Cn%3F16%3A10)%3Breturn%20String.fromCharCode(s)%7D)%7D%2C_getJSONLD%3Afunction(i)%7Bvar%20e%3Dthis._getAllNodesWithTag(i%2C%5B%22script%22%5D)%2Ct%3Breturn%20this._forEachNode(e%2Cfunction(n)%7Bif(!t%26%26n.getAttribute(%22type%22)%3D%3D%3D%22application%2Fld%2Bjson%22)try%7Bvar%20a%3Dn.textContent.replace(%2F%5E%5Cs*%3C!%5C%5BCDATA%5C%5B%7C%5C%5D%5C%5D%3E%5Cs*%24%2Fg%2C%22%22)%2Cs%3DJSON.parse(a)%3Bif(!s%5B%22%40context%22%5D%7C%7C!s%5B%22%40context%22%5D.match(%2F%5Ehttps%3F%5C%3A%5C%2F%5C%2Fschema%5C.org%24%2F)%7C%7C(!s%5B%22%40type%22%5D%26%26Array.isArray(s%5B%22%40graph%22%5D)%26%26(s%3Ds%5B%22%40graph%22%5D.find(function(c)%7Breturn(c%5B%22%40type%22%5D%7C%7C%22%22).match(this.REGEXPS.jsonLdArticleTypes)%7D))%2C!s%7C%7C!s%5B%22%40type%22%5D%7C%7C!s%5B%22%40type%22%5D.match(this.REGEXPS.jsonLdArticleTypes)))return%3Bif(t%3D%7B%7D%2Ctypeof%20s.name%3D%3D%22string%22%26%26typeof%20s.headline%3D%3D%22string%22%26%26s.name!%3D%3Ds.headline)%7Bvar%20r%3Dthis._getArticleTitle()%2Cl%3Dthis._textSimilarity(s.name%2Cr)%3E.75%2Co%3Dthis._textSimilarity(s.headline%2Cr)%3E.75%3Bo%26%26!l%3Ft.title%3Ds.headline%3At.title%3Ds.name%7Delse%20typeof%20s.name%3D%3D%22string%22%3Ft.title%3Ds.name.trim()%3Atypeof%20s.headline%3D%3D%22string%22%26%26(t.title%3Ds.headline.trim())%3Bs.author%26%26(typeof%20s.author.name%3D%3D%22string%22%3Ft.byline%3Ds.author.name.trim()%3AArray.isArray(s.author)%26%26s.author%5B0%5D%26%26typeof%20s.author%5B0%5D.name%3D%3D%22string%22%26%26(t.byline%3Ds.author.filter(function(c)%7Breturn%20c%26%26typeof%20c.name%3D%3D%22string%22%7D).map(function(c)%7Breturn%20c.name.trim()%7D).jo InnerText(i).length%3Bif(e%3D%3D%3D0)return%200%3Bvar%20t%3D0%3Breturn%20this._forEachNode(i.getElementsByTagName(%22a%22)%2Cfunction(n)%7Bvar%20a%3Dn.getAttribute(%22href%22)%2Cs%3Da%26%26this.REGEXPS.hashUrl.test(a)%3F.3%3A1%3Bt%2B%3Dthis._getInnerText(n).length*s%7D)%2Ct%2Fe%7D%2C_getClassWeight%3Afunction(i)%7Bif(!this._flagIsActive(this.FLAG_WEIGHT_CLASSES))return%200%3Bvar%20e%3D0%3Breturn%20typeof%20i.className%3D%3D%22string%22%26%26i.className!%3D%3D%22%22%26%26(this.REGEXPS.negative.test(i.className)%26%26(e-%3D25)%2Cthis.REGEXPS.positive.test(i.className)%26%26(e%2B%3D25))%2Ctypeof%20i.id%3D%3D%22string%22%26%26i.id!%3D%3D%22%22%26%26(this.REGEXPS.negative.test(i.id)%26%26(e-%3D25)%2Cthis.REGEXPS.positive.test(i.id)%26%26(e%2B%3D25))%2Ce%7D%2C_clean%3Afunction(i%2Ce)%7Bvar%20t%3D%5B%22object%22%2C%22embed%22%2C%22iframe%22%5D.indexOf(e)!%3D%3D-1%3Bthis._removeNodes(this._getAllNodesWithTag(i%2C%5Be%5D)%2Cfunction(n)%7Bif(t)%7Bfor(var%20a%3D0%3Ba%3Cn.attributes.length%3Ba%2B%2B)if(this._allowedVideoRegex.test(n.attributes%5Ba%5D.value))return!1%3Bif(n.tagName%3D%3D%3D%22object%22%26%26this._allowedVideoRegex.test(n.innerHTML))return!1%7Dreturn!0%7D)%7D%2C_hasAncestorTag%3Afunction(i%2Ce%2Ct%2Cn)%7Bt%3Dt%7C%7C3%2Ce%3De.toUpperCase()%3Bfor(var%20a%3D0%3Bi.parentNode%3B)%7Bif(t%3E0%26%26a%3Et)return!1%3Bif(i.parentNode.tagName%3D%3D%3De%26%26(!n%7C%7Cn(i.parentNode)))return!0%3Bi%3Di.parentNode%2Ca%2B%2B%7Dreturn!1%7D%2C_getRowAndColumnCount%3Afunction(i)%7Bfor(var%20e%3D0%2Ct%3D0%2Cn%3Di.getElementsByTagName(%22tr%22)%2Ca%3D0%3Ba%3Cn.length%3Ba%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20s%3Dn%5Ba%5D.getAttribute(%22rowspan%22)%7C%7C0%3Bs%26%26(s%3DparseInt(s%2C10))%2Ce%2B%3Ds%7C%7C1%3Bfor(var%20r%3D0%2Cl%3Dn%5Ba%5D.getElementsByTagName(%22td%22)%2Co%3D0%3Bo%3Cl.length%3Bo%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20c%3Dl%5Bo%5D.getAttribute(%22colspan%22)%7C%7C0%3Bc%26%26(c%3DparseInt(c%2C10))%2Cr%2B%3Dc%7C%7C1%7Dt%3DMath.max(t%2Cr)%7Dreturn%7Brows%3Ae%2Ccolumns%3At%7D%7D%2C_markDataTables%3Afunction(i)%7Bfor(var% extSibling%7C%7Ce.parentNode%3Ae.firstChild%7C%7Ce.nextSibling%7C%7Ce.parentNode%7Dvar%20Ee%3Dtypeof%20window%3C%22u%22%3Fwindow%3A%7B%7D%3Bfunction%20Wt()%7Bvar%20i%3DEe.DOMParser%2Ce%3D!1%3Btry%7Bnew%20i().parseFromString(%22%22%2C%22text%2Fhtml%22)%26%26(e%3D!0)%7Dcatch%7B%7Dreturn%20e%7Dfunction%20Vt()%7Bvar%20i%3Dfunction()%7B%7D%3Breturn%20Xt()%3Fi.prototype.parseFromString%3Dfunction(e)%7Bvar%20t%3Dnew%20window.ActiveXObject(%22htmlfile%22)%3Breturn%20t.designMode%3D%22on%22%2Ct.open()%2Ct.write(e)%2Ct.close()%2Ct%7D%3Ai.prototype.parseFromString%3Dfunction(e)%7Bvar%20t%3Ddocument.implementation.createHTMLDocument(%22%22)%3Breturn%20t.open()%2Ct.write(e)%2Ct.close()%2Ct%7D%2Ci%7Dfunction%20Xt()%7Bvar%20i%3D!1%3Btry%7Bdocument.implementation.createHTMLDocument(%22%22).open()%7Dcatch%7BEe.ActiveXObject%26%26(i%3D!0)%7Dreturn%20i%7Dvar%20jt%3DWt()%3FEe.DOMParser%3AVt()%3Bfunction%20qt(i%2Ce)%7Bvar%20t%3Bif(typeof%20i%3D%3D%22string%22)%7Bvar%20n%3DZt().parseFromString('%3Cx-turndown%20id%3D%22turndown-root%22%3E'%2Bi%2B%22%3C%2Fx-turndown%3E%22%2C%22text%2Fhtml%22)%3Bt%3Dn.getElementById(%22turndown-root%22)%7Delse%20t%3Di.cloneNode(!0)%3Breturn%20Ft(%7Belement%3At%2CisBlock%3A_e%2CisVoid%3AKe%2CisPre%3Ae.preformattedCode%3FYt%3Anull%7D)%2Ct%7Dvar%20be%3Bfunction%20Zt()%7Breturn%20be%3Dbe%7C%7Cnew%20jt%2Cbe%7Dfunction%20Yt(i)%7Breturn%20i.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22PRE%22%7C%7Ci.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22CODE%22%7Dfunction%20Qt(i%2Ce)%7Breturn%20i.isBlock%3D_e(i)%2Ci.isCode%3Di.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22CODE%22%7C%7Ci.parentNode.isCode%2Ci.isBlank%3DKt(i)%2Ci.flankingWhitespace%3DJt(i%2Ce)%2Ci%7Dfunction%20Kt(i)%7Breturn!Ke(i)%26%26!zt(i)%26%26%2F%5E%5Cs*%24%2Fi.test(i.textContent)%26%26!Mt(i)%26%26!Ht(i)%7Dfunction%20Jt(i%2Ce)%7Bif(i.isBlock%7C%7Ce.preformattedCode%26%26i.isCode)return%7Bleading%3A%22%22%2Ctrailing%3A%22%22%7D%3Bvar%20t%3Dei(i.textContent)%3Breturn%20t.leadingAscii%26%26je(%22left%22%2Ci%2Ce)%26%26(t.leading%3Dt.leadingNonAscii)%2Ct.trailingAscii%26%26je(%22right%22%2Ci%2Ce)%26%26(t.trailing%3Dt.trailingNonAscii)%2C%7Bleading%3At.leading%2Ctrailing%3At.trailing%7D%7Dfunction%20ei(i)%7Bvar%20e%3Di.match(%2F%5E((%5B%20%5Ct%5Cr%5Cn%5D*)(%5Cs*))(%3F%3A(%3F%3D%5CS)%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%5CS)%3F((%5Cs*%3F)(%5B%20%5Ct%5Cr%5Cn%5D*))%24%2F)%3Breturn%7Bleading%3Ae%5B1%5D%2CleadingAscii%3Ae%5B2%5D%2CleadingNonAscii%3Ae%5B3%5D%2Ctrailing%3Ae%5B4%5D%2CtrailingNonAscii%3Ae%5B5%5D%2CtrailingAscii%3Ae%5B6%5D%7D%7Dfunction%20je(i%2Ce%2Ct)%7Bvar%20n%2Ca%2Cs%3Breturn%20i%3D%3D%3D%22left%22%3F(n%3De.previousSibling%2Ca%3D%2F%20%24%2F)%3A(n%3De.nextSibling%2Ca%3D%2F%5E%20%2F)%2Cn%26%26(n.nodeType%3D%3D%3D3%3Fs%3Da.test(n.nodeValue)%3At.preformattedCode%26%26n.nodeName%3D%3D%3D%22CODE%22%3Fs%3D!1%3An.nodeType%3D%3D%3D1%26%26!_e(n)%26%26(s%3Da.test(n.textContent)))%2Cs%7Dvar%20ti%3DArray.prototype.reduce%3Bfunction%20F(i)%7Bif(!(this%20instanceof%20F))return%20new%20F(i)%3Bvar%20e%3D%7Brules%3AT%2CheadingStyle%3A%22setext%22%2Chr%3A%22*%20*%20*%22%2CbulletListMarker%3A%22*%22%2CcodeBlockStyle%3A%22indented%22%2Cfence%3A%22%60%60%60%22%2CemDelimiter%3A%22_%22%2CstrongDelimiter%3A%22**%22%2ClinkStyle%3A%22inlined%22%2ClinkReferenceStyle%3A%22full%22%2Cbr%3A%22%20%20%22%2CpreformattedCode%3A!1%2CblankReplacement%3Afunction(t%2Cn)%7Breturn%20n.isBlock%3F%60%0A%0A%60%3A%22%22%7D%2CkeepReplacement%3Afunction(t%2Cn)%7Breturn%20n.isBlock%3F%60%0A%0A%60%2Bn.outerHTML%2B%60%0A%0A%60%3An.outerHTML%7D%2CdefaultReplacement%3Afunction(t%2Cn)%7Breturn%20n.isBlock%3F%60%0A%0A%60%2Bt%2B%60%0A%0A%60%3At%7D%7D%3Bthis.options%3D%24t(%7B%7D%2Ce%2Ci)%2Cthis.rules%3Dnew%20it(this.options)%7DF.prototype%3D%7Bturndown%3Afunction(i)%7Bif(!ri(i))throw%20new%20TypeError(i%2B%22%20is%20not%20a%20string%2C%20or%20an%20element%2Fdocument%2Ffragment%20node.%22)%3Bif(i%3D%3D%3D%22%22)return%22%22%3Bvar%20e%3Dnt.call(this%2Cnew%20qt(i%2Cthis.options))%3Breturn%20ii.call(this%2Ce)%7D%2Cuse%3Afunction(i)%7Bif(Array.isArray(i))for(var%20e%3D0%3Be%3Ci.length%3Be%2B%2B)this.use(i%5Be%5D)%3Belse%20if(typeof%20i%3D%3D%22function%22)i(this)%3Belse%20throw%20new%20TypeError(%22plugin%20must%20be%20a%20Function%20or%20an%20Array%20of%20Functions%22)%3Breturn%20this%7D%2CaddRule%3Afunction(i%2Ce)%7Breturn%20this.rules.add(i%2Ce)%2Cthis%7D%2Ckeep%3Afunction(i)%7Breturn%20this.rules.keep(i)%2Cthis%7D%2Cremove%3Afunction(i)%7Breturn%20this.rules.remove(i)%2Cthis%7D%2Cescape%3Afunction(i)%7Breturn%20tt(i)%7D%7D%3Bfunction%20nt(i)%7Bvar%20e%3Dthis%3Breturn%20ti.call(i.childNodes%2Cfunction(t%2Cn)%7Bn%3Dnew%20Qt(n%2Ce.options)%3Bvar%20a%3D%22%22%3Breturn%20n.nodeType%3D%3D%3D3%3Fa%3Dn.isCode%3Fn.nodeValue%3Ae.escape(n.nodeValue)%3An.nodeType%3D%3D%3D1%26%26(a%3Dni.call(e%2Cn))%2Crt(t%2Ca)%7D%2C%22%22)%7Dfunction%20ii(i)%7Bvar%20e%3Dthis%3Breturn%20this.rules.forEach(function(t)%7Btypeof%20t.append%3D%3D%22function%22%26%26(i%3Drt(i%2Ct.append(e.options)))%7D)%2Ci.replace(%2F%5E%5B%5Ct%5Cr%5Cn%5D%2B%2F%2C%22%22).replace(%2F%5B%5Ct%5Cr%5Cn%5Cs%5D%2B%24%2F%2C%22%22)%7Dfunction%20ni(i)%7Bvar%20e%3Dthis.rules.forNode(i)%2Ct%3Dnt.call(this%2Ci)%2Cn%3Di.flankingWhitespace%3Breturn(n.leading%7C%7Cn.trailing)%26%26(t%3Dt.trim())%2Cn.leading%2Be.replacement(t%2Ci%2Cthis.options)%2Bn.trailing%7Dfunction%20rt(i%2Ce)%7Bvar%20t%3DZe(i)%2Cn%3Dqe(e)%2Ca%3DMath.max(i.length-t.length%2Ce.length-n.length)%2Cs%3D%60%0A%0A%60.substring(0%2Ca)%3Breturn%20t%2Bs%2Bn%7Dfunction%20ri(i)%7Breturn%20i!%3Dnull%26%26(typeof%20i%3D%3D%22string%22%7C%7Ci.nodeType%26%26(i.nodeType%3D%3D%3D1%7C%7Ci.nodeType%3D%3D%3D9%7C%7Ci.nodeType%3D%3D%3D11))%7Dfunction%20we()%7Breturn%7Basync%3A!1%2Cbreaks%3A!1%2Cextensions%3Anull%2Cgfm%3A!0%2Chooks%3Anull%2Cpedantic%3A!1%2Crenderer%3Anull%2Csilent%3A!1%2Ctokenizer%3Anull%2CwalkTokens%3Anull%7D%7Dvar%20O%3Dwe()%3Bfunction%20ht(i)%7BO%3Di%7Dvar%20ut%3D%2F%5B%26%3C%3E%22'%5D%2F%2Csi%3Dnew%20RegExp(ut.source%2C%22g%22)%2Cft%3D%2F%5B%3C%3E%22'%5D%7C%26(%3F!(%23%5Cd%7B1%2C7%7D%7C%23%5BXx%5D%5Ba-fA-F0-9%5D%7B1%2C6%7D%7C%5Cw%2B)%3B)%2F%2Cai%3Dnew%20RegExp(ft.source%2 eturn%20i.slice(0%2Cn-a)%7Dfunction%20ui(i%2Ce)%7Bif(i.indexOf(e%5B1%5D)%3D%3D%3D-1)return-1%3Blet%20t%3D0%3Bfor(let%20n%3D0%3Bn%3Ci.length%3Bn%2B%2B)if(i%5Bn%5D%3D%3D%3D%22%5C%5C%22)n%2B%2B%3Belse%20if(i%5Bn%5D%3D%3D%3De%5B0%5D)t%2B%2B%3Belse%20if(i%5Bn%5D%3D%3D%3De%5B1%5D%26%26(t--%2Ct%3C0))return%20n%3Breturn-1%7Dfunction%20ot(i%2Ce%2Ct%2Cn)%7Blet%20a%3De.href%2Cs%3De.title%3FA(e.title)%3Anull%2Cr%3Di%5B1%5D.replace(%2F%5C%5C(%5B%5C%5B%5C%5D%5D)%2Fg%2C%22%241%22)%3Bif(i%5B0%5D.charAt(0)!%3D%3D%22!%22)%7Bn.state.inLink%3D!0%3Blet%20l%3D%7Btype%3A%22link%22%2Craw%3At%2Chref%3Aa%2Ctitle%3As%2Ctext%3Ar%2Ctokens%3An.inlineTokens(r)%7D%3Breturn%20n.state.inLink%3D!1%2Cl%7Dreturn%7Btype%3A%22image%22%2Craw%3At%2Chref%3Aa%2Ctitle%3As%2Ctext%3AA(r)%7D%7Dfunction%20fi(i%2Ce)%7Blet%20t%3Di.match(%2F%5E(%5Cs%2B)(%3F%3A%60%60%60)%2F)%3Bif(t%3D%3D%3Dnull)return%20e%3Blet%20n%3Dt%5B1%5D%3Breturn%20e.split(%60%0A%60).map(a%3D%3E%7Blet%20s%3Da.match(%2F%5E%5Cs%2B%2F)%3Bif(s%3D%3D%3Dnull)return%20a%3Blet%5Br%5D%3Ds%3Breturn%20r.length%3E%3Dn.length%3Fa.slice(n.length)%3Aa%7D).join(%60%0A%60)%7Dvar%20z%3Dclass%7Boptions%3Brules%3Blexer%3Bconstructor(e)%7Bthis.options%3De%7C%7CO%7Dspace(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.newline.exec(e)%3Bif(t%26%26t%5B0%5D.length%3E0)return%7Btype%3A%22space%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%7D%7Dcode(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.code.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20n%3Dt%5B0%5D.replace(%2F%5E%20%7B1%2C4%7D%2Fgm%2C%22%22)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22code%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2CcodeBlockStyle%3A%22indented%22%2Ctext%3Athis.options.pedantic%3Fn%3AJ(n%2C%60%0A%60)%7D%7D%7Dfences(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.fences.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20n%3Dt%5B0%5D%2Ca%3Dfi(n%2Ct%5B3%5D%7C%7C%22%22)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22code%22%2Craw%3An%2Clang%3At%5B2%5D%3Ft%5B2%5D.trim().replace(this.rules.inline.anyPunctuation%2C%22%241%22)%3At%5B2%5D%2Ctext%3Aa%7D%7D%7Dheading(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.heading.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20n%3Dt%5B2%5D.trim()%3Bif(%2F%23%24%2F.test(n))%7Blet%20a%3DJ(n%2C% %3A%5B*%2B-%5D%7C%5C%5Cd%7B1%2C9%7D%5B.)%5D)((%3F%3A%5B%20%09%5D%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*)%3F(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%24))%60)%2CS%3Dnew%20RegExp(%60%5E%20%7B0%2C%24%7BMath.min(3%2Cg-1)%7D%7D((%3F%3A-%20*)%7B3%2C%7D%7C(%3F%3A_%20*)%7B3%2C%7D%7C(%3F%3A%5C%5C*%20*)%7B3%2C%7D)(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%60)%2Cw%3Dnew%20RegExp(%60%5E%20%7B0%2C%24%7BMath.min(3%2Cg-1)%7D%7D(%3F%3A%5C%60%5C%60%5C%60%7C~~~)%60)%2Cp%3Dnew%20RegExp(%60%5E%20%7B0%2C%24%7BMath.min(3%2Cg-1)%7D%7D%23%60)%3Bfor(%3Be%3B)%7Blet%20y%3De.split(%60%0A%60%2C1)%5B0%5D%3Bif(f%3Dy%2Cthis.options.pedantic%26%26(f%3Df.replace(%2F%5E%20%7B1%2C4%7D(%3F%3D(%20%7B4%7D)*%5B%5E%20%5D)%2Fg%2C%22%20%20%22))%2Cw.test(f)%7C%7Cp.test(f)%7C%7CN.test(f)%7C%7CS.test(e))break%3Bif(f.search(%2F%5B%5E%20%5D%2F)%3E%3Dg%7C%7C!f.trim())o%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bf.slice(g)%3Belse%7Bif(b%7C%7Cu.search(%2F%5B%5E%20%5D%2F)%3E%3D4%7C%7Cw.test(u)%7C%7Cp.test(u)%7C%7CS.test(u))break%3Bo%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bf%7D!b%26%26!f.trim()%26%26(b%3D!0)%2Cl%2B%3Dy%2B%60%0A%60%2Ce%3De.substring(y.length%2B1)%2Cu%3Df.slice(g)%7D%7Ds.loose%7C%7C(c%3Fs.loose%3D!0%3A%2F%5Cn%20*%5Cn%20*%24%2F.test(l)%26%26(c%3D!0))%3Blet%20_%3Dnull%2Ck%3Bthis.options.gfm%26%26(_%3D%2F%5E%5C%5B%5B%20xX%5D%5C%5D%20%2F.exec(o)%2C_%26%26(k%3D_%5B0%5D!%3D%3D%22%5B%20%5D%20%22%2Co%3Do.replace(%2F%5E%5C%5B%5B%20xX%5D%5C%5D%20%2B%2F%2C%22%22)))%2Cs.items.push(%7Btype%3A%22list_item%22%2Craw%3Al%2Ctask%3A!!_%2Cchecked%3Ak%2Cloose%3A!1%2Ctext%3Ao%2Ctokens%3A%5B%5D%7D)%2Cs.raw%2B%3Dl%7Ds.items%5Bs.items.length-1%5D.raw%3Dl.trimEnd()%2Cs.items%5Bs.items.length-1%5D.text%3Do.trimEnd()%2Cs.raw%3Ds.raw.trimEnd()%3Bfor(let%20h%3D0%3Bh%3Cs.items.length%3Bh%2B%2B)if(this.lexer.state.top%3D!1%2Cs.items%5Bh%5D.tokens%3Dthis.lexer.blockTokens(s.items%5Bh%5D.text%2C%5B%5D)%2C!s.loose)%7Blet%20u%3Ds.items%5Bh%5D.tokens.filter(g%3D%3Eg.type%3D%3D%3D%22space%22)%2Cf%3Du.length%3E0%26%26u.some(g%3D%3E%2F%5Cn.*%5Cn%2F.test(g.raw))%3Bs.loose%3Df%7Dif(s.loose)for(let%20h%3D0%3Bh%3Cs.items.length%3Bh%2B%2B)s.items%5Bh%5D.loos 1%5D.length-1)%3D%3D%3D%60%0A%60%3Ft%5B1%5D.slice(0%2C-1)%3At%5B1%5D%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22paragraph%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3An%2Ctokens%3Athis.lexer.inline(n)%7D%7D%7Dtext(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.block.text.exec(e)%3Bif(t)return%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctokens%3Athis.lexer.inline(t%5B0%5D)%7D%7Descape(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.escape.exec(e)%3Bif(t)return%7Btype%3A%22escape%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3AA(t%5B1%5D)%7D%7Dtag(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.tag.exec(e)%3Bif(t)return!this.lexer.state.inLink%26%26%2F%5E%3Ca%20%2Fi.test(t%5B0%5D)%3Fthis.lexer.state.inLink%3D!0%3Athis.lexer.state.inLink%26%26%2F%5E%3C%5C%2Fa%3E%2Fi.test(t%5B0%5D)%26%26(this.lexer.state.inLink%3D!1)%2C!this.lexer.state.inRawBlock%26%26%2F%5E%3C(pre%7Ccode%7Ckbd%7Cscript)(%5Cs%7C%3E)%2Fi.test(t%5B0%5D)%3Fthis.lexer.state.inRawBlock%3D!0%3Athis.lexer.state.inRawBlock%26%26%2F%5E%3C%5C%2F(pre%7Ccode%7Ckbd%7Cscript)(%5Cs%7C%3E)%2Fi.test(t%5B0%5D)%26%26(this.lexer.state.inRawBlock%3D!1)%2C%7Btype%3A%22html%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2CinLink%3Athis.lexer.state.inLink%2CinRawBlock%3Athis.lexer.state.inRawBlock%2Cblock%3A!1%2Ctext%3At%5B0%5D%7D%7Dlink(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.link.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20n%3Dt%5B2%5D.trim()%3Bif(!this.options.pedantic%26%26%2F%5E%3C%2F.test(n))%7Bif(!%2F%3E%24%2F.test(n))return%3Blet%20r%3DJ(n.slice(0%2C-1)%2C%22%5C%5C%22)%3Bif((n.length-r.length)%252%3D%3D%3D0)return%7Delse%7Blet%20r%3Dui(t%5B2%5D%2C%22()%22)%3Bif(r%3E-1)%7Blet%20o%3D(t%5B0%5D.indexOf(%22!%22)%3D%3D%3D0%3F5%3A4)%2Bt%5B1%5D.length%2Br%3Bt%5B2%5D%3Dt%5B2%5D.substring(0%2Cr)%2Ct%5B0%5D%3Dt%5B0%5D.substring(0%2Co).trim()%2Ct%5B3%5D%3D%22%22%7D%7Dlet%20a%3Dt%5B2%5D%2Cs%3D%22%22%3Bif(this.options.pedantic)%7Blet%20r%3D%2F%5E(%5B%5E'%22%5D*%5B%5E%5Cs%5D)%5Cs%2B(%5B'%22%5D)(.*)%5C2%2F.exec(a)%3Br%26%26(a%3Dr%5B1%5D%2Cs%3Dr%5B3%5D)%7Delse%20s%3Dt%5B3%5D%3Ft%5B3%5D.slice(1%2C-1)%3A%22%22%3Breturn%20a%3Da.trim()%2C%2F%5E%3C%2F.test(a)%26%26(this.options.pedantic%26%26!%2F%3E%24%2F.test(n)%3Fa%3Da.slice(1)%3Aa%3Da.slice(1%2C-1))%2Cot(t%2C%7Bhref%3Aa%26%26a.replace(this.rules.inline.anyPunctuation%2C%22%241%22)%2Ctitle%3As%26%26s.replace(this.rules.inline.anyPunctuation%2C%22%241%22)%7D%2Ct%5B0%5D%2Cthis.lexer)%7D%7Dreflink(e%2Ct)%7Blet%20n%3Bif((n%3Dthis.rules.inline.reflink.exec(e))%7C%7C(n%3Dthis.rules.inline.nolink.exec(e)))%7Blet%20a%3D(n%5B2%5D%7C%7Cn%5B1%5D).replace(%2F%5Cs%2B%2Fg%2C%22%20%22)%2Cs%3Dt%5Ba.toLowerCase()%5D%3Bif(!s)%7Blet%20r%3Dn%5B0%5D.charAt(0)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Craw%3Ar%2Ctext%3Ar%7D%7Dreturn%20ot(n%2Cs%2Cn%5B0%5D%2Cthis.lexer)%7D%7DemStrong(e%2Ct%2Cn%3D%22%22)%7Blet%20a%3Dthis.rules.inline.emStrongLDelim.exec(e)%3Bif(!a%7C%7Ca%5B3%5D%26%26n.match(%2F%5B%5Cp%7BL%7D%5Cp%7BN%7D%5D%2Fu))return%3Bif(!(a%5B1%5D%7C%7Ca%5B2%5D%7C%7C%22%22)%7C%7C!n%7C%7Cthis.rules.inline.punctuation.exec(n))%7Blet%20r%3D%5B...a%5B0%5D%5D.length-1%2Cl%2Co%2Cc%3Dr%2Ch%3D0%2Cu%3Da%5B0%5D%5B0%5D%3D%3D%3D%22*%22%3Fthis.rules.inline.emStrongRDelimAst%3Athis.rules.inline.emStrongRDelimUnd%3Bfor(u.lastIndex%3D0%2Ct%3Dt.slice(-1*e.length%2Br)%3B(a%3Du.exec(t))!%3Dnull%3B)%7Bif(l%3Da%5B1%5D%7C%7Ca%5B2%5D%7C%7Ca%5B3%5D%7C%7Ca%5B4%5D%7C%7Ca%5B5%5D%7C%7Ca%5B6%5D%2C!l)continue%3Bif(o%3D%5B...l%5D.length%2Ca%5B3%5D%7C%7Ca%5B4%5D)%7Bc%2B%3Do%3Bcontinue%7Delse%20if((a%5B5%5D%7C%7Ca%5B6%5D)%26%26r%253%26%26!((r%2Bo)%253))%7Bh%2B%3Do%3Bcontinue%7Dif(c-%3Do%2Cc%3E0)continue%3Bo%3DMath.min(o%2Co%2Bc%2Bh)%3Blet%20f%3D%5B...a%5B0%5D%5D%5B0%5D.length%2Cg%3De.slice(0%2Cr%2Ba.index%2Bf%2Bo)%3Bif(Math.min(r%2Co)%252)%7Blet%20_%3Dg.slice(1%2C-1)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22em%22%2Craw%3Ag%2Ctext%3A_%2Ctokens%3Athis.lexer.inlineTokens(_)%7D%7Dlet%20b%3Dg.slice(2%2C-2)%3Breturn%7Btype%3A%22strong%22%2Craw%3Ag%2Ctext%3Ab%2Ctokens%3Athis.lexer.inlineTokens(b)%7D%7D%7D%7Dcodespan(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.code.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20n%3Dt%5B2%5D.replace(%2F%5Cn%2Fg%2C%22%20%22)%2Ca%3D%2F%5B%5E%20%5D%2F.test(n)%2Cs%3D%2F%5E%20%2F.test(n)%26%26%2F%20%24%2F.test(n)%3Breturn%20a%26%26s%26%26(n%3Dn.substring(1%2Cn.length-1))%2Cn%3DA(n%2C!0)%2C%7Btype%3A%22codespan%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3An%7D%7D%7Dbr(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.br.exec(e)%3Bif(t)return%7Btype%3A%22br%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%7D%7Ddel(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.del.exec(e)%3Bif(t)return%7Btype%3A%22del%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3At%5B2%5D%2Ctokens%3Athis.lexer.inlineTokens(t%5B2%5D)%7D%7Dautolink(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.autolink.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20n%2Ca%3Breturn%20t%5B2%5D%3D%3D%3D%22%40%22%3F(n%3DA(t%5B1%5D)%2Ca%3D%22mailto%3A%22%2Bn)%3A(n%3DA(t%5B1%5D)%2Ca%3Dn)%2C%7Btype%3A%22link%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3An%2Chref%3Aa%2Ctokens%3A%5B%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Craw%3An%2Ctext%3An%7D%5D%7D%7D%7Durl(e)%7Blet%20t%3Bif(t%3Dthis.rules.inline.url.exec(e))%7Blet%20n%2Ca%3Bif(t%5B2%5D%3D%3D%3D%22%40%22)n%3DA(t%5B0%5D)%2Ca%3D%22mailto%3A%22%2Bn%3Belse%7Blet%20s%3Bdo%20s%3Dt%5B0%5D%2Ct%5B0%5D%3Dthis.rules.inline._backpedal.exec(t%5B0%5D)%3F.%5B0%5D%3F%3F%22%22%3Bwhile(s!%3D%3Dt%5B0%5D)%3Bn%3DA(t%5B0%5D)%2Ct%5B1%5D%3D%3D%3D%22www.%22%3Fa%3D%22http%3A%2F%2F%22%2Bt%5B0%5D%3Aa%3Dt%5B0%5D%7Dreturn%7Btype%3A%22link%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3An%2Chref%3Aa%2Ctokens%3A%5B%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Craw%3An%2Ctext%3An%7D%5D%7D%7D%7DinlineText(e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.rules.inline.text.exec(e)%3Bif(t)%7Blet%20n%3Breturn%20this.lexer.state.inRawBlock%3Fn%3Dt%5B0%5D%3An%3DA(t%5B0%5D)%2C%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Craw%3At%5B0%5D%2Ctext%3An%7D%7D%7D%7D%2Cgi%3D%2F%5E(%3F%3A%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))%2B%2F%2Cpi%3D%2F%5E(%20%7B4%7D%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5Cn(%3F%3A%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))*)%3F)%2B%2F%2Cdi%3D%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%60%7B3%2C%7D(%3F%3D%5B%5E%60%5Cn%5D*(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)(%5B%5E%5Cn%5D*)(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24)(%3F%3A%7C(%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F)(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))(%3F%3A%20%7B0%2C3%7D%5C1%5B~%60%5D*%20*(%3F%3D%5Cn%7C%24)%7C%24)%2F%2Cj%3D%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D((%3F%3A-%5B%5Ct%20%5D*)%7B3%2C%7D%7C(%3F%3A_%5B%20%5Ct%5D*)%7B3%2C%7D%7C(%3F%3A%5C*%5B%20%5Ct%5D*)%7B3%2C%7D)(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F%2Cmi%3D%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%23%7B1%2C6%7D)(%3F%3D%5Cs%7C%24)(.*)(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F%2Cgt%3D%2F(%3F%3A%5B*%2B-%5D%7C%5Cd%7B1%2C9%7D%5B.)%5D)%2F%2Cpt%3Dx(%2F%5E(%3F!bull%20%7CblockCode%7Cfences%7Cblockquote%7Cheading%7Chtml)((%3F%3A.%7C%5Cn(%3F!%5Cs*%3F%5Cn%7Cbull%20%7CblockCode%7Cfences%7Cblockquote%7Cheading%7Chtml))%2B%3F)%5Cn%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3D%2B%7C-%2B)%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F).replace(%2Fbull%2Fg%2Cgt).replace(%2FblockCode%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B4%7D%2F).replace(%2Ffences%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%60%7B3%2C%7D%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)%2F).replace(%2Fblockquote%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%2F).replace(%2Fheading%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%23%7B1%2C6%7D%2F).replace(%2Fhtml%2Fg%2C%2F%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3C%5B%5E%5Cn%3E%5D%2B%3E%5Cn%2F).getRegex()%2CAe%3D%2F%5E(%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5Cn(%3F!hr%7Cheading%7Clheading%7Cblockquote%7Cfences%7Clist%7Chtml%7Ctable%7C%20%2B%5Cn)%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B)*)%2F%2Cbi%3D%2F%5E%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B%2F%2CSe%3D%2F(%3F!%5Cs*%5C%5D)(%3F%3A%5C%5C.%7C%5B%5E%5C%5B%5C%5D%5C%5C%5D)%2B%2F%2Cxi%3Dx(%2F%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%3A%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%20*)%3F(%5B%5E%3C%5Cs%5D%5B%5E%5Cs%5D*%7C%3C.*%3F%3E)(%3F%3A(%3F%3A%20%2B(%3F%3A%5Cn%20*)%3F%7C%20*%5Cn%20*)(title))%3F%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F).replace(%22label%22%2CSe).replace(%22title%22%2C%2F(%3F%3A%22(%3F%3A%5C%5C%22%3F%7C%5B%5E%22%5C%5C%5D)*%22%7C'%5B%5E'%5Cn%5D*(%3F%3A%5Cn%5B%5E'%5Cn%5D%2B)*%5Cn%3F'%7C%5C(%5B%5E()%5D*%5C))%2F).getRegex()%2C_i%3Dx(%2F%5E(%20%7B0%2C3%7Dbull)(%5B%20%5Ct%5D%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B%3F)%3F(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24)%2F).replace(%2Fbull%2Fg%2Cgt).getRegex()%2Cie%3D%22address%7Carticle%7Caside%7Cbase%7Cbasefont%7Cblockquote%7Cbody%7Ccaption%7Ccenter%7Ccol%7Ccolgroup%7Cdd%7Cdetails%7Cdialog%7Cdir%7Cdiv%7Cdl%7Cdt%7Cfieldset%7Cfigcaption%7Cfigure%7Cfooter%7Cform%7Cframe%7Cframeset%7Ch%5B1-6%5D%7Chead%7Cheader%7Chr%7Chtml%7Ciframe%7Clegend%7Cli%7Clink%7Cmain%7Cmenu%7Cmenuitem%7Cmeta%7Cnav%7Cnoframes%7Col%7Coptgroup%7Coption%7Cp%7Cparam%7Csearch%7Csection%7Csummary%7Ctable%7Ctbody%7Ctd%7Ctfoot%7Cth%7Cthead%7Ctitle%7Ctr%7Ctrack%7Cul%22%2CRe%3D%2F%3C!--(%3F%3A-%3F%3E%7C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A--%3E%7C%24))%2F%2Cki%3Dx(%22%5E%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%3C(script%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea)%5B%5C%5Cs%3E%5D%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A%3C%2F%5C%5C1%3E%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%7Ccomment%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*(%5C%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%7C%3C%5C%5C%3F%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A%5C%5C%3F%3E%5C%5Cn*%7C%24)%7C%3C!%5BA-Z%5D%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A%3E%5C%5Cn*%7C%24)%7C%3C!%5C%5C%5BCDATA%5C%5C%5B%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A%5C%5C%5D%5C%5C%5D%3E%5C%5Cn*%7C%24)%7C%3C%2F%3F(tag)(%3F%3A%20%2B%7C%5C%5Cn%7C%2F%3F%3E)%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%20*)%2B%5C%5Cn%7C%24)%7C%3C(%3F!script%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea)(%5Ba-z%5D%5B%5C%5Cw-%5D*)(%3F%3Aattribute)*%3F%20*%2F%3F%3E(%3F%3D%5B%20%5C%5Ct%5D*(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%24))%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%20*)%2B%5C%5Cn%7C%24)%7C%3C%2F(%3F!script%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea)%5Ba-z%5D%5B%5C%5Cw-%5D*%5C%5Cs*%3E(%3F%3D%5B%20%5C%5Ct%5D*(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%24))%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%20*)%2B%5C%5Cn%7C%24))%22%2C%22i%22).replace(%22comment%22%2CRe).replace(%22tag%22%2Cie).replace(%22attribute%22%2C%2F%20%2B%5Ba-zA-Z%3A_%5D%5B%5Cw.%3A-%5D*(%3F%3A%20*%3D%20*%22%5B%5E%22%5Cn%5D*%22%7C%20*%3D%20*'%5B%5E'%5Cn%5D*'%7C%20*%3D%20*%5B%5E%5Cs%22'%3D%3C%3E%60%5D%2B)%3F%2F).getRegex()%2Cdt%3Dx(Ae).replace(%22hr%22%2Cj).replace(%22heading%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%23%7B1%2C6%7D(%3F%3A%5C%5Cs%7C%24)%22).replace(%22%7Clheading%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22%7Ctable%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22blockquote%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%22).replace(%22fences%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%60%7B3%2C%7D(%3F%3D%5B%5E%60%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn)%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn%22).replace(%22list%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%5B*%2B-%5D%7C1%5B.)%5D)%20%22).replace(%22html%22%2C%22%3C%2F%3F(%3F%3Atag)(%3F%3A%20%2B%7C%5C%5Cn%7C%2F%3F%3E)%7C%3C(%3F%3Ascript%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea%7C!--)%22).replace(%22tag%22%2Cie).getRegex()%2Cyi%3Dx(%2F%5E(%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%20%3F(paragraph%7C%5B%5E%5Cn%5D*)(%3F%3A%5Cn%7C%24))%2B%2F).replace(%22paragraph%22%2Cdt).getRegex()%2CLe%3D%7Bblockquote%3Ayi%2Ccode%3Api%2Cdef%3Axi%2Cfences%3Adi%2Cheading%3Ami%2Chr%3Aj%2Chtml%3Aki%2Clheading%3Apt%2Clist%3A_i%2Cnewline%3Agi%2Cparagraph%3Adt%2Ctable%3AV%2Ctext%3Abi%7D%2Cct%3Dx(%22%5E%20*(%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%20%5D.*)%5C%5Cn%20%7B0%2C3%7D((%3F%3A%5C%5C%7C%20*)%3F%3A%3F-%2B%3A%3F%20*(%3F%3A%5C%5C%7C%20*%3A%3F-%2B%3A%3F%20*)*(%3F%3A%5C%5C%7C%20*)%3F)(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn((%3F%3A(%3F!%20*%5C%5Cn%7Chr%7Cheading%7Cblockquote%7Ccode%7Cfences%7Clist%7Chtml).*(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%24))*)%5C%5Cn*%7C%24)%22).replace(%22hr%22%2Cj).replace(%22heading%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%23%7B1%2C6%7D(%3F%3A%5C%5Cs%7C%24)%22).replace(%22blockquote%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%22).replace(%22code%22%2C%22%20%7B4%7D%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D%22).replace(%22fences%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%60%7B3%2C%7D(%3F%3D%5B%5E%60%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn)%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn%22).replace(%22list%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%5B*%2B-%5D%7C1%5B.)%5D)%20%22).replace(%22html%22%2C%22%3C%2F%3F(%3F%3Atag)(%3F%3A%20%2B%7C%5C%5Cn%7C%2F%3F%3E)%7C%3C(%3F%3Ascript%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea%7C!--)%22).replace(%22tag%22%2Cie).getRegex()%2Cvi%3D%7B...Le%2Ctable%3Act%2Cparagraph%3Ax(Ae).replace(%22hr%22%2Cj).replace(%22heading%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%23%7B1%2C6%7D(%3F%3A%5C%5Cs%7C%24)%22).replace(%22%7Clheading%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22table%22%2Cct).replace(%22blockquote%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%22).replace(%22fences%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%60%7B3%2C%7D(%3F%3D%5B%5E%60%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn)%7C~%7B3%2C%7D)%5B%5E%5C%5Cn%5D*%5C%5Cn%22).replace(%22list%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3F%3A%5B*%2B-%5D%7C1%5B.)%5D)%20%22).replace(%22html%22%2C%22%3C%2F%3F(%3F%3Atag)(%3F%3A%20%2B%7C%5C%5Cn%7C%2F%3F%3E)%7C%3C(%3F%3Ascript%7Cpre%7Cstyle%7Ctextarea%7C!--)%22).replace(%22tag%22%2Cie).getRegex()%7D%2CEi%3D%7B...Le%2Chtml%3Ax(%60%5E%20*(%3F%3Acomment%20*(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7C%5C%5Cs*%24)%7C%3C(tag)%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D%2B%3F%3C%2F%5C%5C1%3E%20*(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7B2%2C%7D%7C%5C%5Cs*%24)%7C%3Ctag(%3F%3A%22%5B%5E%22%5D*%22%7C'%5B%5E'%5D*'%7C%5C%5Cs%5B%5E'%22%2F%3E%5C%5Cs%5D*)*%3F%2F%3F%3E%20*(%3F%3A%5C%5Cn%7B2%2C%7D%7C%5C%5Cs*%24))%60).replace(%22comment%22%2CRe).replace(%2Ftag%2Fg%2C%22(%3F!(%3F%3Aa%7Cem%7Cstrong%7Csmall%7Cs%7Ccite%7Cq%7Cdfn%7Cabbr%7Cdata%7Ctime%7Ccode%7Cvar%7Csamp%7Ckbd%7Csub%7Csup%7Ci%7Cb%7Cu%7Cmark%7Cruby%7Crt%7Crp%7Cbdi%7Cbdo%7Cspan%7Cbr%7Cwbr%7Cins%7Cdel%7Cimg)%5C%5Cb)%5C%5Cw%2B(%3F!%3A%7C%5B%5E%5C%5Cw%5C%5Cs%40%5D*%40)%5C%5Cb%22).getRegex()%2Cdef%3A%2F%5E%20*%5C%5B(%5B%5E%5C%5D%5D%2B)%5C%5D%3A%20*%3C%3F(%5B%5E%5Cs%3E%5D%2B)%3E%3F(%3F%3A%20%2B(%5B%22(%5D%5B%5E%5Cn%5D%2B%5B%22)%5D))%3F%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F%2Cheading%3A%2F%5E(%23%7B1%2C6%7D)(.*)(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F%2Cfences%3AV%2Clheading%3A%2F%5E(.%2B%3F)%5Cn%20%7B0%2C3%7D(%3D%2B%7C-%2B)%20*(%3F%3A%5Cn%2B%7C%24)%2F%2Cparagraph%3Ax(Ae).replace(%22hr%22%2Cj).replace(%22heading%22%2C%60%20*%23%7B1%2C6%7D%20*%5B%5E%0A%5D%60).replace(%22lheading%22%2Cpt).replace(%22%7Ctable%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22blockquote%22%2C%22%20%7B0%2C3%7D%3E%22).replace(%22%7Cfences%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22%7Clist%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22%7Chtml%22%2C%22%22).replace(%22%7Ctag%22%2C%22%22).getRegex()%7D%2Cmt%3D%2F%5E%5C%5C(%5B!%22%23%24%25%26'()*%2B%2C%5C-.%2F%3A%3B%3C%3D%3E%3F%40%5C%5B%5C%5D%5C%5C%5E_%60%7B%7C%7D~%5D)%2F%2CTi%3D%2F%5E(%60%2B)(%5B%5E%60%5D%7C%5B%5E%60%5D%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F%5B%5E%60%5D)%5C1(%3F!%60)%2F%2Cbt%3D%2F%5E(%20%7B2%2C%7D%7C%5C%5C)%5Cn(%3F!%5Cs*%24)%2F%2CNi%3D%2F%5E(%60%2B%7C%5B%5E%60%5D)(%3F%3A(%3F%3D%20%7B2%2C%7D%5Cn)%7C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A(%3F%3D%5B%5C%5C%3C!%5C%5B%60*_%5D%7C%5Cb_%7C%24)%7C%5B%5E%20%5D(%3F%3D%20%7B2%2C%7D%5Cn)))%2F%2Cq%3D%22%5C%5Cp%7BP%7D%5C%5Cp%7BS%7D%22%2Cwi%3Dx(%2F%5E((%3F!%5B*_%5D)%5B%5Cspunctuation%5D)%2F%2C%22u%22).replace(%2Fpunctuation%2Fg%2Cq).getRegex()%2CAi%3D%2F%5C%5B%5B%5E%5B%5C%5D%5D*%3F%5C%5D%5C(%5B%5E%5C(%5C)%5D*%3F%5C)%7C%60%5B%5E% e)*%3F%5C%5Cs*%2F%3F%3E%7C%5E%3C%5C%5C%3F%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F%5C%5C%3F%3E%7C%5E%3C!%5Ba-zA-Z%5D%2B%5C%5Cs%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F%3E%7C%5E%3C!%5C%5C%5BCDATA%5C%5C%5B%5B%5C%5Cs%5C%5CS%5D*%3F%5C%5C%5D%5C%5C%5D%3E%22).replace(%22comment%22%2CDi).replace(%22attribute%22%2C%2F%5Cs%2B%5Ba-zA-Z%3A_%5D%5B%5Cw.%3A-%5D*(%3F%3A%5Cs*%3D%5Cs*%22%5B%5E%22%5D*%22%7C%5Cs*%3D%5Cs*'%5B%5E'%5D*'%7C%5Cs*%3D%5Cs*%5B%5E%5Cs%22'%3D%3C%3E%60%5D%2B)%3F%2F).getRegex()%2Cte%3D%2F(%3F%3A%5C%5B(%3F%3A%5C%5C.%7C%5B%5E%5C%5B%5C%5D%5C%5C%5D)*%5C%5D%7C%5C%5C.%7C%60%5B%5E%60%5D*%60%7C%5B%5E%5C%5B%5C%5D%5C%5C%60%5D)*%3F%2F%2CBi%3Dx(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%5C(%5Cs*(href)(%3F%3A%5Cs%2B(title))%3F%5Cs*%5C)%2F).replace(%22label%22%2Cte).replace(%22href%22%2C%2F%3C(%3F%3A%5C%5C.%7C%5B%5E%5Cn%3C%3E%5C%5C%5D)%2B%3E%7C%5B%5E%5Cs%5Cx00-%5Cx1f%5D*%2F).replace(%22title%22%2C%2F%22(%3F%3A%5C%5C%22%3F%7C%5B%5E%22%5C%5C%5D)*%22%7C'(%3F%3A%5C%5C'%3F%7C%5B%5E'%5C%5C%5D)*'%7C%5C((%3F%3A%5C%5C%5C)%3F%7C%5B%5E)%5C%5C%5D)*%5C)%2F).getRegex()%2Cxt%3Dx(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%5C%5B(ref)%5C%5D%2F).replace(%22label%22%2Cte).replace(%22ref%22%2CSe).getRegex()%2C_t%3Dx(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(ref)%5C%5D(%3F%3A%5C%5B%5C%5D)%3F%2F).replace(%22ref%22%2CSe).getRegex()%2C%24i%3Dx(%22reflink%7Cnolink(%3F!%5C%5C()%22%2C%22g%22).replace(%22reflink%22%2Cxt).replace(%22nolink%22%2C_t).getRegex()%2CCe%3D%7B_backpedal%3AV%2CanyPunctuation%3ACi%2Cautolink%3AIi%2CblockSkip%3AAi%2Cbr%3Abt%2Ccode%3ATi%2Cdel%3AV%2CemStrongLDelim%3ASi%2CemStrongRDelimAst%3ARi%2CemStrongRDelimUnd%3ALi%2Cescape%3Amt%2Clink%3ABi%2Cnolink%3A_t%2Cpunctuation%3Awi%2Creflink%3Axt%2CreflinkSearch%3A%24i%2Ctag%3APi%2Ctext%3ANi%2Curl%3AV%7D%2COi%3D%7B...Ce%2Clink%3Ax(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%5C((.*%3F)%5C)%2F).replace(%22label%22%2Cte).getRegex()%2Creflink%3Ax(%2F%5E!%3F%5C%5B(label)%5C%5D%5Cs*%5C%5B(%5B%5E%5C%5D%5D*)%5C%5D%2F).replace(%22label%22%2Cte).getRegex()%7D%2CTe%3D%7B...Ce%2Cescape%3Ax(mt).replace(%22%5D)%22%2C%22~%7C%5D)%22).getRegex()%2Curl%3Ax(%2F%5E((%3F%3Aftp%7Chttps%3F)%3A%5C%2F%5C%2F%7Cwww%5C.)(%3F%3A%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5C-%5D%2B%5C.%3F)%2B%5B%5E%5Cs%3C%5D*%7C%5Eemail%2F%2C%22i%22).replace(%22email%22%2C%2F%5BA-Za-z0-9._%2B-%5D%2B(%40)%5Ba-zA-Z0-9-_%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5C.%5Ba-zA-Z0-9-_%5D*%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5D)%2B(%3F!%5B-_%5D)%2F).getRegex()%2C_backpedal%3A%2F(%3F%3A%5B%5E%3F!.%2C%3A%3B*_'%22~()%26%5D%2B%7C%5C(%5B%5E)%5D*%5C)%7C%26(%3F!%5Ba-zA-Z0-9%5D%2B%3B%24)%7C%5B%3F!.%2C%3A%3B*_'%22~)%5D%2B(%3F!%24))%2B%2F%2Cdel%3A%2F%5E(~~%3F)(%3F%3D%5B%5E%5Cs~%5D)(%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F%5B%5E%5Cs~%5D)%5C1(%3F%3D%5B%5E~%5D%7C%24)%2F%2Ctext%3A%2F%5E(%5B%60~%5D%2B%7C%5B%5E%60~%5D)(%3F%3A(%3F%3D%20%7B2%2C%7D%5Cn)%7C(%3F%3D%5Ba-zA-Z0-9.!%23%24%25%26'*%2B%5C%2F%3D%3F_%60%7B%5C%7C%7D~-%5D%2B%40)%7C%5B%5Cs%5CS%5D*%3F(%3F%3A(%3F%3D%5B%5C%5C%3C!%5C%5B%60*~_%5D%7C%5Cb_%7Chttps%3F%3A%5C%2F%5C%2F%7Cftp%3A%5C%2F%5C%2F%7Cwww%5C.%7C%24)%7C%5B%5E%20%5D(%3F%3D%20%7B2%2C%7D%5Cn)%7C%5B%5Ea-zA-Z0-9.!%23%24%25%26'*%2B%5C%2F%3D%3F_%60%7B%5C%7C%7D~-%5D(%3F%3D%5Ba-zA-Z0-9.!%23%24%25%26'*%2B%5C%2F%3D%3F_%60%7B%5C%7C%7D~-%5D%2B%40)))%2F%7D%2CMi%3D%7B...Te%2Cbr%3Ax(bt).replace(%22%7B2%2C%7D%22%2C%22*%22).getRegex()%2Ctext%3Ax(Te.text).replace(%22%5C%5Cb_%22%2C%22%5C%5Cb_%7C%20%7B2%2C%7D%5C%5Cn%22).replace(%2F%5C%7B2%2C%5C%7D%2Fg%2C%22*%22).getRegex()%7D%2Cee%3D%7Bnormal%3ALe%2Cgfm%3Avi%2Cpedantic%3AEi%7D%2CW%3D%7Bnormal%3ACe%2Cgfm%3ATe%2Cbreaks%3AMi%2Cpedantic%3AOi%7D%2CC%3Dclass%20i%7Btokens%3Boptions%3Bstate%3Btokenizer%3BinlineQueue%3Bconstructor(e)%7Bthis.tokens%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis.tokens.links%3DObject.create(null)%2Cthis.options%3De%7C%7CO%2Cthis.options.tokenizer%3Dthis.options.tokenizer%7C%7Cnew%20z%2Cthis.tokenizer%3Dthis.options.tokenizer%2Cthis.tokenizer.options%3Dthis.options%2Cthis.tokenizer.lexer%3Dthis%2Cthis.inlineQueue%3D%5B%5D%2Cthis.state%3D%7BinLink%3A!1%2CinRawBlock%3A!1%2Ctop%3A!0%7D%3Blet%20t%3D%7Bblock%3Aee.normal%2Cinline%3AW.normal%7D%3Bthis.options.pedantic%3F(t.block%3Dee.pedantic%2Ct.inline%3DW.pedantic)%3Athis.options.gfm%26%26(t.bloc his.tokenizer.html(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.def(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ca%3Dt%5Bt.length-1%5D%2Ca%26%26(a.type%3D%3D%3D%22paragraph%22%7C%7Ca.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22)%3F(a.raw%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bn.raw%2Ca.text%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bn.raw%2Cthis.inlineQueue%5Bthis.inlineQueue.length-1%5D.src%3Da.text)%3Athis.tokens.links%5Bn.tag%5D%7C%7C(this.tokens.links%5Bn.tag%5D%3D%7Bhref%3An.href%2Ctitle%3An.title%7D)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.table(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.lheading(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3De%2Cthis.options.extensions%26%26this.options.extensions.startBlock)%7Blet%20l%3D1%2F0%2Co%3De.slice(1)%2Cc%3Bthis.options.extensions.startBlock.forEach(h%3D%3E%7Bc%3Dh.call(%7Blexer%3Athis%7D%2Co)%2Ctypeof%20c%3D%3D%22number%22%26%26c%3E%3D0%26%26(l%3DMath.min(l%2Cc))%7D)%2Cl%3C1%2F0%26%26l%3E%3D0%26%26(s%3De.substring(0%2Cl%2B1))%7Dif(this.state.top%26%26(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.paragraph(s)))%7Ba%3Dt%5Bt.length-1%5D%2Cr%26%26a.type%3D%3D%3D%22paragraph%22%3F(a.raw%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bn.raw%2Ca.text%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bn.text%2Cthis.inlineQueue.pop()%2Cthis.inlineQueue%5Bthis.inlineQueue.length-1%5D.src%3Da.text)%3At.push(n)%2Cr%3Ds.length!%3D%3De.length%2Ce%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.text(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ca%3Dt%5Bt.length-1%5D%2Ca%26%26a.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%3F(a.raw%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bn.raw%2Ca.text%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2Bn.text%2Cthis.inlineQueue.pop()%2Cthis.inlineQueue%5Bthis.inlineQueue.length-1%5D.src%3Da.text)%3At.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(e)%7Blet%20l%3D%22Infinite%20loop%20on%20byte%3A%20%22%2Be.charCodeAt(0)%3Bif(this.options.silent)%7Bconsole.error(l)%3Bbreak%7Delse%20throw%20new%20Error(l)%7D%7Dreturn%20this.state.top%3D!0%2Ct%7Dinline(e%2Ct%3D%5B%5D)%7Breturn%20this.inlineQueue.push(%7Bsrc%3Ae%2Ctokens%3At%7D)%2Ct%7DinlineTokens(e%2Ct%3D%5B%5D)%7Blet%20n%2Ca%2Cs%2Cr%3De%2Cl%2Co%2Cc%3Bif(this.tokens.links)%7Blet%20h%3DObject.keys(this.tokens.links)%3Bif(h.length%3E0)for(%3B(l%3Dthis.tokenizer.rules.inline.reflinkSearch.exec(r))!%3Dnull%3B)h.includes(l%5B0%5D.slice(l%5B0%5D.lastIndexOf(%22%5B%22)%2B1%2C-1))%26%26(r%3Dr.slice(0%2Cl.index)%2B%22%5B%22%2B%22a%22.repeat(l%5B0%5D.length-2)%2B%22%5D%22%2Br.slice(this.tokenizer.rules.inline.reflinkSearch.lastIndex))%7Dfor(%3B(l%3Dthis.tokenizer.rules.inline.blockSkip.exec(r))!%3Dnull%3B)r%3Dr.slice(0%2Cl.index)%2B%22%5B%22%2B%22a%22.repeat(l%5B0%5D.length-2)%2B%22%5D%22%2Br.slice(this.tokenizer.rules.inline.blockSkip.lastIndex)%3Bfor(%3B(l%3Dthis.tokenizer.rules.inline.anyPunctuation.exec(r))!%3Dnull%3B)r%3Dr.slice(0%2Cl.index)%2B%22%2B%2B%22%2Br.slice(this.tokenizer.rules.inline.anyPunctuation.lastIndex)%3Bfor(%3Be%3B)if(o%7C%7C(c%3D%22%22)%2Co%3D!1%2C!(this.options.extensions%26%26this.options.extensions.inline%26%26this.options.extensions.inline.some(h%3D%3E(n%3Dh.call(%7Blexer%3Athis%7D%2Ce%2Ct))%3F(e%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%2C!0)%3A!1)))%7Bif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.escape(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.tag(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ca%3Dt%5Bt.length-1%5D%2Ca%26%26n.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%26%26a.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%3F(a.raw%2B%3Dn.raw%2Ca.text%2B%3Dn.text)%3At.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.link(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.reflink(e%2Cthis.tokens.links))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ca%3Dt%5Bt.length-1%5D%2Ca%26%26n.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%26%26a.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%3F(a.raw%2B%3Dn.raw%2Ca.text%2B%3Dn.text)%3At.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.emStrong(e%2Cr%2Cc))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.codespan(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.br(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.del(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.autolink(e))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(!this.state.inLink%26%26(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.url(e)))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Ct.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(s%3De%2Cthis.options.extensions%26%26this.options.extensions.startInline)%7Blet%20h%3D1%2F0%2Cu%3De.slice(1)%2Cf%3Bthis.options.extensions.startInline.forEach(g%3D%3E%7Bf%3Dg.call(%7Blexer%3Athis%7D%2Cu)%2Ctypeof%20f%3D%3D%22number%22%26%26f%3E%3D0%26%26(h%3DMath.min(h%2Cf))%7D)%2Ch%3C1%2F0%26%26h%3E%3D0%26%26(s%3De.substring(0%2Ch%2B1))%7Dif(n%3Dthis.tokenizer.inlineText(s))%7Be%3De.substring(n.raw.length)%2Cn.raw.slice(-1)!%3D%3D%22_%22%26%26(c%3Dn.raw.slice(-1))%2Co%3D!0%2Ca%3Dt%5Bt.length-1%5D%2Ca%26%26a.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%3F(a.raw%2B%3Dn.raw%2Ca.text%2B%3Dn.text)%3At.push(n)%3Bcontinue%7Dif(e)%7Blet%20h%3D%22Infinite%20loop%20on%20byte%3A%20%22%2Be.charCodeAt(0)%3Bif(this.options.silent)%7Bconsole.error(h)%3Bbreak%7Delse%20throw%20new%20Error(h)%7D%7Dreturn%20t%7D%7D%2CH%3Dclass%7Boptions%3Bconstructor(e)%7Bthis.options%3De%7C%7CO%7Dcode(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Blet%20a%3D(t%7C%7C%22%22).match(%2F%5E%5CS*%2F)%3F.%5B0%5D%3Breturn%20e%3De.replace(%2F%5Cn%24%2F%2C%22%22)%2B%60%0A%60%2Ca%3F'%3Cpre%3E%3Ccode%20class%3D%22language-'%2BA(a)%2B'%22%3E'%2B(n%3Fe%3AA(e%2C!0))%2B%60%3C%2Fcode%3E%3C%2Fpre%3E%0A%60%3A%22%3Cpre%3E%3Ccode%3E%22%2B(n%3Fe%3AA(e%2C!0))%2B%60%3C%2Fcode%3E%3C%2Fpre%3E%0A%60%7Dblockquote(e)%7Breturn%60%3Cblockquote%3E%0A%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Fblockquote%3E%0A%60%7Dhtml(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20e%7Dheading(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Breturn%60%3Ch%24%7Bt%7D%3E%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Fh%24%7Bt%7D%3E%0A%60%7Dhr()%7Breturn%60%3Chr%3E%0A%60%7Dlist(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Blet%20a%3Dt%3F%22ol%22%3A%22ul%22%2Cs%3Dt%26%26n!%3D%3D1%3F'%20start%3D%22'%2Bn%2B'%22'%3A%22%22%3Breturn%22%3C%22%2Ba%2Bs%2B%60%3E%0A%60%2Be%2B%22%3C%2F%22%2Ba%2B%60%3E%0A%60%7Dlistitem(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Breturn%60%3Cli%3E%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Fli%3E%0A%60%7Dcheckbox(e)%7Breturn%22%3Cinput%20%22%2B(e%3F'checked%3D%22%22%20'%3A%22%22)%2B'disabled%3D%22%22%20type%3D%22checkbox%22%3E'%7Dparagraph(e)%7Breturn%60%3Cp%3E%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Fp%3E%0A%60%7Dtable(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20t%26%26(t%3D%60%3Ctbody%3E%24%7Bt%7D%3C%2Ftbody%3E%60)%2C%60%3Ctable%3E%0A%3Cthead%3E%0A%60%2Be%2B%60%3C%2Fthead%3E%0A%60%2Bt%2B%60%3C%2Ftable%3E%0A%60%7Dtablerow(e)%7Breturn%60%3Ctr%3E%0A%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Ftr%3E%0A%60%7Dtablecell(e%2Ct)%7Blet%20n%3Dt.header%3F%22th%22%3A%22td%22%3Breturn(t.align%3F%60%3C%24%7Bn%7D%20align%3D%22%24%7Bt.align%7D%22%3E%60%3A%60%3C%24%7Bn%7D%3E%60)%2Be%2B%60%3C%2F%24%7Bn%7D%3E%0A%60%7Dstrong(e)%7Breturn%60%3Cstrong%3E%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Fstrong%3E%60%7Dem(e)%7Breturn%60%3Cem%3E%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Fem%3E%60%7Dcodespan(e)%7Breturn%60%3Ccode%3E%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Fcode%3E%60%7Dbr()%7Breturn%22%3Cbr%3E%22%7Ddel(e)%7Breturn%60%3Cdel%3E%24%7Be%7D%3C%2Fdel%3E%60%7Dlink(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Blet%20a%3Dat(e)%3Bif(a%3D%3D%3Dnull)return%20n%3Be%3Da%3Blet%20s%3D'%3Ca%20href%3D%22'%2Be%2B'%22'%3Breturn%20t%26%26(s%2B%3D'%20title%3D%22'%2Bt%2B'%22')%2Cs%2B%3D%22%3E%22%2Bn%2B%22%3C%2Fa%3E%22%2Cs%7Dimage(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Blet%20a%3Dat(e)%3Bif(a%3D%3D%3Dnull)return%20n%3Be%3Da%3Blet%20s%3D%60%3Cimg%20src%3D%22%24%7Be%7D%22%20alt%3D%22%24%7Bn%7D%22%60%3Breturn%20t%26%26(s%2B%3D%60%20title%3D%22%24%7Bt%7D%22%60)%2Cs%2B%3D%22%3E%22%2Cs%7Dtext(e)%7Breturn%20e%7D%7D%2CX%3Dclass%7Bstrong(e)%7Breturn%20e%7Dem(e)%7Breturn%20e%7Dcodespan(e)%7Breturn%20e%7Ddel(e)%7Breturn%20e%7Dhtml(e)%7Breturn%20e%7Dtext(e)%7Breturn%20e%7Dlink(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Breturn%22%22%2Bn%7Dimage(e%2Ct%2Cn)%7Breturn%22%22%2Bn%7Dbr()%7Breturn%22%22%7D%7D%2CI%3Dclass%20i%7Boptions%3Brenderer%3BtextRenderer%3Bconstructor(e)%7Bthis.options%3De%7C%7CO%2Cthis.options.renderer%3Dthis.options.renderer%7C%7Cnew%20H%2Cthis.renderer%3Dthis.options.renderer%2Cthis.renderer.options%3Dthis.options%2Cthis.textRenderer%3Dnew%20X%7Dstatic%20parse(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20new%20i(t).parse(e)%7Dstatic%20parseInline(e%2Ct)%7Breturn%20new%20i(t).parseInline(e)%7Dparse(e%2Ct%3D!0)%7Blet%20n%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20a%3D0%3Ba%3Ce.length%3Ba%2B%2B)%7Blet%20s%3De%5Ba%5D%3Bif(this.options.extensions%26%26this.options.extensions.renderers%26%26this.options.extensions.renderers%5Bs.type%5D)%7Blet%20r%3Ds%2Cl%3Dthis.options.extensions.renderers%5Br.type%5D.call(%7Bparser%3Athis%7D%2Cr)%3Bif(l!%3D%3D!1%7C%7C!%5B%22space%22%2C%22hr%22%2C%22heading%22%2C%22code%22%2C%22table%22%2C%22blockquote%22%2C%22list%22%2C%22html%22%2C%22paragraph%22%2C%22text%22%5D.includes(r.type))%7Bn%2B%3Dl%7C%7C%22%22%3Bcontinue%7D%7Dswitch(s.type)%7Bcase%22space%22%3Acontinue%3Bcase%22hr%22%3A%7Bn%2B%3Dthis.renderer.hr()%3Bcontinue%7Dcase%22heading%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dthis.renderer.heading(this.parseInline(r.tokens)%2Cr.depth%2Cci(this.parseInline(r.tokens%2Cthis.textRenderer)))%3Bcontinue%7Dcase%22code%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dthis.renderer.code(r.text%2Cr.lang%2C!!r.escaped)%3Bcontinue%7Dcase%22table%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%2Cl%3D%22%22%2Co%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20h%3D0%3Bh%3Cr.header.length%3Bh%2B%2B)o%2B%3Dthis.renderer.tablecell(this.parseInline(r.header%5Bh%5D.tokens)%2C%7Bheader%3A!0%2Calign%3Ar.align%5Bh%5D%7D)%3Bl%2B%3Dthis.renderer.tablerow(o)%3Blet%20c%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20h%3D0%3Bh%3Cr.rows.length%3Bh%2B%2B)%7Blet%20u%3Dr.rows%5Bh%5D%3Bo%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20f%3D0%3Bf%3Cu.length%3Bf%2B%2B)o%2B%3Dthis.renderer.tablecell(this.parseInline(u%5Bf%5D.tokens)%2C%7Bheader%3A!1%2Calign%3Ar.align%5Bf%5D%7D)%3Bc%2B%3Dthis.renderer.tablerow(o)%7Dn%2B%3Dthis.renderer.table(l%2Cc)%3Bcontinue%7Dcase%22blockquote%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%2Cl%3Dthis.parse(r.tokens)%3Bn%2B%3Dthis.renderer.blockquote(l)%3Bcontinue%7Dcase%22list%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%2Cl%3Dr.ordered%2Co%3Dr.start%2Cc%3Dr.loose%2Ch%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20u%3D0%3Bu%3Cr.items.length%3Bu%2B%2B)%7Blet%20f%3Dr.items%5Bu%5D%2Cg%3Df.checked%2Cb%3Df.task%2C_%3D%22%22%3Bif(f.task)%7Blet%20k%3Dthis.renderer.checkbox(!!g)%3Bc%3Ff.tokens.length%3E0%26%26f.tokens%5B0%5D.type%3D%3D%3D%22paragraph%22%3F(f.tokens%5B0%5D.text%3Dk%2B%22%20%22%2Bf.tokens%5B0%5D.text%2Cf.tokens%5B0%5D.tokens%26%26f.tokens%5B0%5D.tokens.length%3E0%26%26f.tokens%5B0%5D.tokens%5B0%5D.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%26%26(f.tokens%5B0%5D.tokens%5B0%5D.text%3Dk%2B%22%20%22%2Bf.tokens%5B0%5D.tokens%5B0%5D.text))%3Af.tokens.unshift(%7Btype%3A%22text%22%2Ctext%3Ak%2B%22%20%22%7D)%3A_%2B%3Dk%2B%22%20%22%7D_%2B%3Dthis.parse(f.tokens%2Cc)%2Ch%2B%3Dthis.renderer.listitem(_%2Cb%2C!!g)%7Dn%2B%3Dthis.renderer.list(h%2Cl%2Co)%3Bcontinue%7Dcase%22html%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dthis.renderer.html(r.text%2Cr.block)%3Bcontinue%7Dcase%22paragraph%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dthis.renderer.paragraph(this.parseInline(r.tokens))%3Bcontinue%7Dcase%22text%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%2Cl%3Dr.tokens%3Fthis.parseInline(r.tokens)%3Ar.text%3Bfor(%3Ba%2B1%3Ce.length%26%26e%5Ba%2B1%5D.type%3D%3D%3D%22text%22%3B)r%3De%5B%2B%2Ba%5D%2Cl%2B%3D%60%0A%60%2B(r.tokens%3Fthis.parseInline(r.tokens)%3Ar.text)%3Bn%2B%3Dt%3Fthis.renderer.paragraph(l)%3Al%3Bcontinue%7Ddefault%3A%7Blet%20r%3D'Token%20with%20%22'%2Bs.type%2B'%22%20type%20was%20not%20found.'%3Bif(this.options.silent)return%20console.error(r)%2C%22%22%3Bthrow%20new%20Error(r)%7D%7D%7Dreturn%20n%7DparseInline(e%2Ct)%7Bt%3Dt%7C%7Cthis.renderer%3Blet%20n%3D%22%22%3Bfor(let%20a%3D0%3Ba%3Ce.length%3Ba%2B%2B)%7Blet%20s%3De%5Ba%5D%3Bif(this.options.extensions%26%26this.options.extensions.renderers%26%26this.options.extensions.renderers%5Bs.type%5D)%7Blet%20r%3Dthis.options.extensions.renderers%5Bs.type%5D.call(%7Bparser%3Athis%7D%2Cs)%3Bif(r!%3D%3D!1%7C%7C!%5B%22escape%22%2C%22html%22%2C%22link%22%2C%22image%22%2C%22strong%22%2C%22em%22%2C%22codespan%22%2C%22br%22%2C%22del%22%2C%22text%22%5D.includes(s.type))%7Bn%2B%3Dr%7C%7C%22%22%3Bcontinue%7D%7Dswitch(s.type)%7Bcase%22escape%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dt.text(r.text)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22html%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dt.html(r.text)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22link%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dt.link(r.href%2Cr.title%2Cthis.parseInline(r.tokens%2Ct))%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22image%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dt.image(r.href%2Cr.title%2Cr.text)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22strong%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dt.strong(this.parseInline(r.tokens%2Ct))%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22em%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dt.em(this.parseInline(r.tokens%2Ct))%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22codespan%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dt.codespan(r.text)%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22br%22%3A%7Bn%2B%3Dt.br()%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22del%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dt.del(this.parseInline(r.tokens%2Ct))%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22text%22%3A%7Blet%20r%3Ds%3Bn%2B%3Dt.text(r.text)%3Bbreak%7Ddefault%3A%7Blet%20r%3D'Token%20with%20%22'%2Bs.type%2B'%22%20type%20was%20not%20found.'%3Bif(this.options.silent)return%20console.error(r)%2C%22%22%3Bthrow%20new%20Error(r)%7D%7D%7Dreturn%20n%7D%7D%2CM%3Dclass%7Boptions%3Bconstructor(e)%7Bthis.options%3De%7C%7CO%7Dstatic%20passThroughHooks%3Dnew%20Set(%5B%22preprocess%22%2C%22postprocess%22%2C%22processAllTokens%22%5D)%3Bpreprocess(e)%7Breturn%20e%7Dpostprocess(e)%7Breturn%20e%7DprocessAllTokens(e)%7Breturn%20e%7D%7D%2CNe%3Dclass%7Bdefaults%3Dwe()%3Boptions%3Dthis.setOptions%3Bparse%3Dthis.%23e(C.lex%2CI.parse)%3BparseInline%3Dthis.%23e(C.lexInline%2CI.parseInline)%3BParser%3DI%3BRenderer%3DH%3BTextRenderer%3DX%3BLexer%3DC%3BTokenizer%3Dz%3BHooks%3DM%3Bconstructor(...e)%7Bthis.use(...e)%7DwalkTokens(e%2Ct)%7Blet%20n%3D%5B%5D%3Bfor(let%20a%20of%20e)switch(n%3Dn.concat(t.call(this%2Ca))%2Ca.type)%7Bcase%22table%22%3A%7Blet%20s%3Da%3Bfor(let%20r%20of%20s.header)n%3Dn.concat(this.walkTokens(r.tokens%2Ct))%3Bfor(let%20r%20of%20s.rows)for(let%20l%20of%20r)n%3Dn.concat(this.walkTokens(l.tokens%2Ct))%3Bbreak%7Dcase%22list%22%3A%7Blet%20s%3Da%3Bn%3Dn.concat(this.walkTokens(s.items%2Ct))%3Bbreak%7Ddefault%3A%7Blet%20s%3Da%3Bthis.defaults.extensions%3F.childTokens%3F.%5Bs.type%5D%3Fthis.defaults.extensions.childTokens%5Bs.type%5D.forEach(r%3D%3E%7Blet%20l%3Ds%5Br%5D.flat(1%2F0)%3Bn%3Dn.concat(this.walkTokens(l%2Ct))%7D)%3As.tokens%26%26(n%3Dn.concat(this.walkTokens(s.tokens%2Ct)))%7D%7Dreturn%20n%7Duse(...e)%7Blet%20t%3Dthis.defaults.extensions%7C%7C%7Brenderers%3A%7B%7D%2CchildTokens%3A%7B%7D%7D%3Breturn%20e.forEach(n%3D%3E%7Blet%20a%3D%7B...n%7D%3Bif(a.async%3Dthis.defaults.async%7C%7Ca.async%7C%7C!1%2Cn.extensions%26%26(n.extensions.forEach(s%3D%3E%7Bif(!s.name)throw%20new%20Error(%22extension%20name%20required%22)%3Bif(%22renderer%22in%20s)%7Blet%20r%3Dt.renderers%5Bs.name%5D%3Br%3Ft.renderers%5Bs.name%5D%3Dfunction(...l)%7Blet%20o%3Ds.renderer.apply(this%2Cl)%3Breturn%20o%3D%3D%3D!1%26%26(o%3Dr.apply(this%2Cl))%2Co%7D%3At.renderers%5Bs.name%5D%3Ds.renderer%7Dif(%22tokenizer%22in%20s)%7Bif(!s.level%7C%7Cs.level!%3D%3D%22block%22%26%26s.level!%3D%3D%22inline%22)throw%20new%20Error(%22extension%20level%20must%20be%20'block'%20or%20'inline'%22)%3Blet%20r%3Dt%5Bs.level%5D%3Br%3Fr.unshift(s.tokenizer)%3At%5Bs.level%5D%3D%5Bs.tokenizer%5D%2Cs.start%26%26(s.level%3D%3D%3D%22block%22%3Ft.startBlock%3Ft.startBlock.push(s.start)%3At.startBlock%3D%5Bs.start%5D%3As.level%3D%3D%3D%22inline%22%26%26(t.startInline%3Ft.startInline.push(s.start)%3At.startInline%3D%5Bs.start%5D))%7D%22childTokens%22in%20s%26%26s.childTokens%26%26(t.childTokens%5Bs.name%5D%3Ds.childTokens)%7D)%2Ca.extensions%3Dt)%2Cn.renderer)%7Blet%20s%3Dthis.defaults.renderer%7C%7Cnew%20H(this.defaults)%3Bfor(let%20r%20in%20n.renderer)%7Bif(!(r%20in%20s))throw%20new%20Error(%60renderer%20'%24%7Br%7D'%20does%20not%20exist%60)%3Bif(r%3D%3D%3D%22options%22)continue%3Blet%20l%3Dr%2Co%3Dn.renderer%5Bl%5D%2Cc%3Ds%5Bl%5D%3Bs%5Bl%5D%3D(...h)%3D%3E%7Blet%20u%3Do.apply(s%2Ch)%3Breturn%20u%3D%3D%3D!1%26%26(u%3Dc.apply(s%2Ch))%2Cu%7C%7C%22%22%7D%7Da.renderer%3Ds%7Dif(n.tokenizer)%7Blet%20s%3Dthis.defaults.tokenizer%7C%7Cnew%20z(this.defaults)%3Bfor(let%20r%20in%20n.tokenizer)%7Bif(!(r%20in%20s))throw%20new%20Error(%60tokenizer%20'%24%7Br%7D'%20does%20not%20exist%60)%3Bif(%5B%22options%22%2C%22rules%22%2C%22lexer%22%5D.includes(r))continue%3Blet%20l%3Dr%2Co%3Dn.tokenizer%5Bl%5D%2Cc%3Ds%5Bl%5D%3Bs%5Bl%5D%3D(...h)%3D% message)%7D%7Dfunction%20a(s)%7Bvar%20r%3Ddocument.getElementById(%22md-extractor-modal%22)%3Br%26%26r.remove()%3Bvar%20l%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bl.id%3D%22md-extractor-modal%22%2Cl.style.cssText%3D%22position%3Afixed%3Btop%3A0%3Bleft%3A0%3Bwidth%3A100%25%3Bheight%3A100%25%3Bbackground%3Argba(0%2C0%2C0%2C0.8)%3Bz-index%3A999999%3Bdisplay%3Aflex%3Bjustify-content%3Acenter%3Balign-items%3Acenter%3Bfont-family%3Asans-serif%3B%22%3Bvar%20o%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bo.style.cssText%3D%22background%3A%23fff%3Bwidth%3A90%25%3Bmax-width%3A1200px%3Bheight%3A90%25%3Bborder-radius%3A8px%3Bdisplay%3Aflex%3Bflex-direction%3Acolumn%3Bpadding%3A20px%3Bbox-shadow%3A0%2010px%2030px%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C0.5)%3B%22%3Bvar%20c%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bc.style.cssText%3D%22display%3Aflex%3Bjustify-content%3Aspace-between%3Balign-items%3Acenter%3Bmargin-bottom%3A15px%3B%22%3Bvar%20h%3Ddocument.createElement(%22h2%22)%3Bh.innerText%3D%22Local%20Markdown%20Extractor%22%2Ch.style.cssText%3D%22margin%3A0%3Bcolor%3A%23333%3Bfont-size%3A20px%3B%22%3Bvar%20u%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bu.style.cssText%3D%22display%3Aflex%3Bgap%3A5px%3B%22%3Bfunction%20f(d%2CP)%7Bvar%20R%3Ddocument.createElement(%22button%22)%3Breturn%20R.innerText%3Dd%2CR.style.cssText%3D%22padding%3A5px%2010px%3Bcursor%3Apointer%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23ccc%3Bbackground%3A%23f8f9fa%3Bborder-radius%3A4px%3Bfont-size%3A12px%3Bcolor%3A%23333%3B%22%2CR.onclick%3DP%2CR%7Dvar%20g%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bg.style.cssText%3D%22display%3Aflex%3Bflex-grow%3A1%3Bgap%3A15px%3Boverflow%3Ahidden%3Bmargin-bottom%3A15px%3B%22%3Bvar%20b%3Ddocument.createElement(%22textarea%22)%3Bb.value%3Ds%2Cb.style.cssText%3D%22flex%3A1%3Bpadding%3A15px%3Bfont-family%3Amonospace%3Bfont-size%3A14px%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%23ccc%3Bborder-radius%3A4px%3Bresize%3Anone%3Bcolor%3A%23333%3Bline-height%3A1.5%3B%22%3Bvar%20_%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3B_.style.cssText%3D'flex%3A1%3Bpadding%3A15
